auth.summary: Authentication cubits for sign-in, sign-up, and OTP verification.
auth.notes: Auth cubits are not registered via GetIt; they are created inline via BlocProvider in each presentation page. injectionModule points to where AppSessionRepository is wired.

history.summary: Read-only view of past workout and nutrition history with edit/delete.
history.notes: Read-only consumer of log's data; shares repository singletons.

home.summary: Dashboard surface aggregating muscle visual state and nutrition summary.
home.notes: HomeBloc is registered directly in injection_container.dart (no dedicated module file). MuscleVisualBloc is in register_muscle_stimulus_module.dart. LoadHomeDashboardData is a feature-local use case wrapper under lib/features/home/application/usecases/.

library.summary: Exercise and meal catalog management (browse, create, edit, delete).
library.notes: ExerciseBloc uses get_muscle_factors_for_exercise (from muscle_factors use cases) for muscle-group display in the catalog.

log.summary: Workout set logging and nutrition logging for the current day.
log.notes: WorkoutBloc also consumes calculate_muscle_stimulus (from the muscle_stimulus domain layer) to compute stimulation scores on each rep-set log.

profile.summary: User profile view and sign-out; manages authenticated-user metadata.
profile.notes: Remote-only repository (Supabase). No local SQLite tables. ProfileCubit also consumes AppSessionRepository and AuthSessionService via the injection module.

settings.summary: App settings surface (units, voice settings, theme preferences).
settings.notes: AppSettingsCubit is registered as lazySingleton (intentional waiver — see register_settings_module.dart:9 and KNOWN_ISSUES.md #blocs-must-be-factories-repositories-singletons). AppSettingsRepository now exposes Stream<AppSettings> watchSettings() with behavior-subject semantics (replay-last-value on subscribe, re-emit after each successful save). AppSettingsCubit subscribes to this stream so writes from any cubit (including VoiceSettingsCubit) are observable.

voice.summary: Wake-word-triggered voice bot: STT on-device, LLM via edge function, TTS on-device.
voice.notes: Edge function lives in supabase/functions/voice-chat/; not fingerprinted by v1 of this check. VoiceBloc emits VoiceMutationCommand effects; VoiceCommandRouter in the widget tree dispatches to WorkoutBloc, NutritionLogBloc, and HistoryBloc via context.read. Mutation tool calls trigger a deterministic spoken readback (built locally from VoiceToolCall.args + WeightUnit) before transitioning to VoiceStatus.awaitingConfirmation and setting pendingConfirmation. Verbal 'cancel'/'nevermind'/'no'/'stop' during a pending confirmation short-circuits without round-tripping to the LLM. _dispatchMutationTool synchronously refreshes _cachedWorkoutSets/_cachedNutritionLogs after each effect emission (D1 fix). STT cap raised from 10 s to 15 s. VoiceSettingsCubit depends on AppSettingsRepository.watchSettings() (no AppSettingsCubit cross-import); provided once via BlocProvider in auth_session_shell.dart. All navigation goes through lib/app/routes/ (named-route registry).
